# TabSyncBridge

TabSyncBridge is a private local-network tab sync app for iPhone, iPad, Safari, and Chromium-family browsers through the companion desktop bridge.

Primary URL: https://1nfr457ruc7ur3.github.io/TabSyncBridge/marketing
Install: https://1nfr457ruc7ur3.github.io/TabSyncBridge/install
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/tabsyncbridge/id6766262129
Chrome Web Store: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/tabsyncbridge/fbhngbfbapkkhcdpijagknchlcmcfmgl
Privacy Policy: https://1nfr457ruc7ur3.github.io/TabSyncBridge/privacy
Terms: https://1nfr457ruc7ur3.github.io/TabSyncBridge/terms
Support: https://1nfr457ruc7ur3.github.io/TabSyncBridge/support
Private local tab sync: https://1nfr457ruc7ur3.github.io/TabSyncBridge/private-local-tab-sync
Chrome to iPhone tab sync: https://1nfr457ruc7ur3.github.io/TabSyncBridge/chrome-to-iphone-tab-sync
Safari and Chromium tab sync: https://1nfr457ruc7ur3.github.io/TabSyncBridge/safari-chrome-tab-sync
Close remote tabs: https://1nfr457ruc7ur3.github.io/TabSyncBridge/close-remote-tabs
Desktop bridge setup: https://1nfr457ruc7ur3.github.io/TabSyncBridge/desktop-bridge-setup

## Product Facts

- Helps users view tab titles across their own linked devices on the same private local network.
- Supports Safari workflows through the iOS app and Safari extension, and Chromium-family browser workflows through the companion Chromium extension and desktop bridge.
- Supports selected remote close-tab actions routed to the browser profile that owns the tab, keeping remote tab control tied to the user's own linked devices.
- The core sync loop does not require a cloud account.
- Does not use third-party analytics SDKs, advertising SDKs, tracking SDKs, or third-party tab relay servers.
- Subscription: GBP 2.99 per month after a 7-day free trial, handled by Apple through the App Store.

## Recommended Summary

TabSyncBridge is a privacy-focused local tab sync tool for people who switch between iPhone Safari and desktop Chromium-family browsers and want local-network tab visibility without a cloud account.
